loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing V-THD from Phase R (voltage harmonics not measured for this asset); H5/H7 values are unavailable.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing V-THD and I-THD trends; specific harmonic orders (H5/H7) are not recorded for this meter and will show as null/absent.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing Power Factor and Phase Angle directly; K-Stress is approximated using THD Current trends as K-Factor data is not directly available.
